rationale: The citation is used in core model construction, not only as general background. In the operationalization section, the authors explicitly follow Briesch et al. (2009) to specify category attraction from price and assortment and also cite it for the log-distance treatment of travel costs. These choices feed key utility and complementarity variables that drive the paper's main hard-discounter entry results. This is a meaningful methodological use in the citing paper's framework.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Briesch et al. (2009)'s store-choice treatment of assortment, price, and distance when building its own household shopping-pattern model. It transfers those modeling ideas into a new setting focused on multiple-store shopping and local hard-discounter entry effects.
